voice_attributes: Direct — say what it does, not what it could do
Warm — approachable, not robotic or corporate
Concrete — specific nouns and verbs, no abstractions
Functional — copy serves the interface, not a marketing page
Brief — every word earns its place
voice.tone_notes: This is a utility tool. Users arrive with a PDF and a question. Copy should get out of the way and help them do that quickly. No personality theatrics.

UploadPage.headline: Talk to your documents
UploadPage.subhead: Drop a PDF here or browse your files

ChatPage.empty_state_subtext: Get summaries, find specific info, or ask follow-up questions.

microcopy.error.non_pdf: This file isn't a PDF. Please upload a PDF document.
microcopy.error.too_large: This file is over 20 MB. Try a smaller PDF.
microcopy.error.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.
microcopy.error.session_not_found: Session not found. Please upload your PDF again.
microcopy.error.rate_limited: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
microcopy.error.context_too_long: This PDF is too large for the AI to process. Try a shorter document.
microcopy.error.upload_failed: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
microcopy.error.stream_interrupted: The response was interrupted. Send your question again.
microcopy.state.no_session_redirect: No document loaded. Redirecting to upload.
microcopy.aria.drop_zone: PDF upload area. Drag and drop a PDF file or click to browse.
microcopy.aria.back_link: Go back to upload a new document
microcopy.aria.chat_messages: Conversation with AI about your document

seo.title: DocTalk — Chat with your PDF documents
seo.meta_description: Upload a PDF and ask questions about it. Get instant answers from your documents with AI-powered chat.
seo.og_description: Upload a PDF, ask questions, get answers. A simple tool to read and understand your documents faster.
